title: Easy Factions
description: Easy server-managed factions with easy and customizable settings.
body: Easy Factions is a server faction mod which is setup by admins rather than players. Type /faction settings to open the settings gui, and /faction help for a guide. You can edit the size of each claim, the method of claiming/expanding, craftablility of items, and more. Includes a map, a faction ledger, a claim banner, and a faction herald tome. Made using CreativeMode.net
